title: Expecting all properties to be returned when creating a SESSION RESULT
gherkin:
When the user creates a "SESSION RESULT" "1st place" with the following data
  | key         | value          |
  | position    | 1              |
  | race_number | N44            |
  | driver_name | Lewis Hamilton |
  | team_name   | Mercedes       |
  | race_time   | PT1H23M45.678S |
  | laps        | 51             |
  | status      | finished       |
  | points      | 25             |
Then the response should contain the following properties
  | key         | value          |
  | position    | 1              |
  | race_number | N44            |
  | driver_name | Lewis Hamilton |
  | team_name   | Mercedes       |
  | race_time   | PT1H23M45.678S |
  | laps        | 51             |
  | status      | finished       |
  | points      | 25             |
